label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 9

extraction.one_line_summary: KÄMNA Lennard attacked with 4.8km remaining on the final wall, soloed to complete his Grand Tour stage win set after GC neutralization at 2km removed pressure.
tactical_patterns: Organizers neutralized GC at 2km out due to mud, eliminating bonus seconds and reducing peloton incentive to chase breakaway.
Jumbo-Visma accidentally infiltrated early break with six riders, forcing peloton restructure before proper breakaway established.
Crosswind splits caught GC contenders Martinez and Dier; Bora prioritized Vlasov's GC position over chasing teammate Kämna in break.
Vlasov actively hunted bonus seconds at GC finish while Evans/Roglic exchanged small attacks, revealing tight top-10 standings importance.

rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: Attacked 4.8km out on 20-23% gradients, confirms breakaway specialization across all three Grand Tours
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: Aggressively seeking bonus seconds despite GC neutralization suggests he's competitive for top-10, not just defending
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: negative: Former race leader caught out in crosswind splits, exposing weakness in positioning/team support
rider_signals.HAMILTON Chris: neutral: DSM rider first to respond on final climb but lacked reserves, typical domestique effort
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Tested Roglic on climb despite GC neutralization, maintaining aggressive posture before rest day time trial
